chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1081 of 2024 Dated Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on Misc. No. 5075/2024 (U/A) 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 5076/2024 3. For hearing of Main Case Dated 19.03.2024 None present for the Petitioner Barrister Sandeep Malani, AAG Mr. Abdul Qudoos Advocate for the Respondent No.5 Mr. Faheem Hussain Panhwar, Additional P.G. Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. This matter involves the freewill marriage between the Petitioners. On 29.02.2024, an interim order was passed followed by another order dated 14.03.2024, however, on the last date of hearing at the request of Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, counsel holding brief for Mr. Saleh Muhammad Brohi, the matter was adjourned and today they are called absent. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
